new.description: CVE-2019-13132 — libzmq CURVE INITIATE stack overflow → RCE. Working exploit + Docker lab.

new.name: CVE-2026-31431
new.description: Fail to copy privilege escalation

new.name: BigFix-CopyFail-AlmaLinux-Content
new.description: This repository contains BigFix Content that I created for identifying the AlmaLinux systems that require patching to remediate CVE-2026-31431

new.name: CVE-2026-31431_CopyFail_LinuxKernel_LPE
new.description: Educational rewrite of the Copy Fail PoC (CVE-2026-31431) — Linux kernel LPE via algif_aead in-place crypto + splice() page-cache write

new.name: copyfail-check
new.description: Shell script to detect CVE-2026-31431 (Copy Fail) exposure and mitigations on Linux systems: kernel check, module state, boot params, AF_ALG reachability, and distro patch status.

new.name: cve-2026-6379
new.description: Lab kit for CVE-2026-6379 — WP Photo Album Plus < 9.1.11.001 unauthenticated SQL injection. Docker lab + time-based blind PoC. For authorized security research and education.

new.name: PoC-Simulator_CVE-2026-27778
new.description: Created with StackBlitz ⚡️

new.name: CVE-2026-34159-Vulnerability-Research-Analysis-Detection
new.description: Critical buffer validation bypass in deserialize_tensor() (llama.cpp < b8492). Null tensor buffer skips bounds check, enabling unauthenticated arbitrary R/W via GRAPH_COMPUTE. ASLR bypass + RCE over TCP 50052.

new.name: copy-fail-CVE-2026-31431-shell
new.description: PoC shell exploit for CVE-2026-31431 (copy_fail) — Linux LPE via AF_ALG + splice page-cache overwrite. Single-shot, no race condition, kernel 4.9–6.18.

new.name: copy-fail-CVE-2026-31431-detection-probe
new.description: Safe detection tooling for CVE-2026-31431 "Copy Fail" — a local privilege escalation in the Linux kernel's algif_aead module affecting all major distributions since 2017.

new.name: RK35xx-CopyFail-Hotfix
new.description: RK35xx CopyFail Hotfix: CVE-2026-31431 Patch for Ubuntu 24.04

new.name: copy-fail-checker
new.description: Read-only Bash checker for the Copy Fail Linux kernel vulnerability (CVE-2026-31431)

new.name: CopyFail-Penguin
new.description: A safe Linux checker for CopyFail/CVE-2026-31431 that reviews kernel version, update status, reboot status, and algif_aead exposure indicators.

new.name: CVE-2026-41940-cPanel-WHM-Verification-Tool
new.description: This repository contains a Python verification script for `CVE-2026-41940`, a critical authentication bypass vulnerability disclosed in cPanel & WHM.  > This project is intended for authorized defensive validation only. It is not intended for exploit development, unauthorized access, or misuse against systems you do not own or administer.

new.name: yc-mk8s-copy-fail-mitigation
new.description: DaemonSet для митигации уязвимости CVE-2026-31431 (Copy Fail)

new.name: copyfail-exploit
new.description: Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) LPE exploit. A clean, multi-arch Python reimplementation targeting the Linux kernel AF_ALG page cache vulnerability.

new.description: CVE-2026-41940: detect and exploit cpanel vuln
